top_signals.title: Oil Gains as Ship Attack Raises Concern About Hormuz Reopening
top_signals.summary: Oil rose as traders closely monitored shipments through the Strait of Hormuz after a vessel was struck by a projectile in the key shipping corridor off the Omani coast, renewing concerns about the safety for passing cargoes amid the US and Iran’s peace negotiations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Iran behind attack on cargo vessel near Oman in Strait of Hormuz, U.S. official tells MS NOW
top_signals.summary: "The only crop we're harvesting is what you planted: decades of mistrust," Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said in a social media post.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Moderna's Flu Vaccine Moves Closer to FDA Approval
top_signals.summary: The FDA advisory committee recommended Moderna's flu vaccine for approval. Moderna CEO Stéphane Bancel tells Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld he is cautiously optimistic that the agency will follow the guidance. A final decision by the FDA is expected by August 5 which is just in time for the next flu season. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Half of UK wealth advisers say clients' crypto is ‘invisible’ to them: CoinShares survey
top_signals.summary: A CoinShares survey found than many EU-based wealth management companies had policies that restricted investments in digital assets or provided no guidance on the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
